movies.title: Dinosaur (2000) Dual Audio
movies.subtitle: [Hindi Dubbed & English]
movies.description: An orphaned dinosaur raised by lemurs joins an arduous trek to a sanctuary after a meteorite shower destroys his family home.

movies.title: Deuce Bigalow: European Gigolo (2005)
movies.subtitle: [Hindi Dubbed & English]
movies.description: Deuce is tricked again into man-whoring by T.J., only in Amsterdam while other man-whores are being murdered in his midst.

movies.title: Chicken Little (2005) Dual Audio
movies.subtitle: [Hindi Dubbed & English]
movies.description: After ruining his reputation with the town, a courageous chicken must come to the rescue of his fellow citizens when aliens start an invasion.

movies.title: Bolt (2008) Dual Audio
movies.subtitle: [Hindi Dubbed & English]
movies.description: The canine star of a fictional sci-fi/action show believes his powers are real and embarks on a cross country trek to save his co-star.

movies.title: The Amazing Spider-Man (2012) Dual Audio
movies.subtitle: [Hindi Dubbed & English]
movies.description: After Peter Parker is bitten by a genetically altered spider, he gains newfound, spider-like powers and ventures out to save the city.

movies.title: The Dark Knight (2008)
movies.subtitle: [Hindi Dubbed & English]
movies.description: When the menace known as the Joker wreaks havoc and chaos on the people of Gotham, Batman must accept one of the greatest tests.

movies.title: Inception (2010) Dual Audio
movies.subtitle: [Hindi Dubbed & English]
movies.description: A thief who steals corporate secrets through the use of dream-sharing technology is given the inverse task of planting an idea.

movies.title: Interstellar (2014)
movies.subtitle: [Hindi Dubbed & English]
movies.description: A team of explorers travel through a wormhole in space in an attempt to ensure humanity's survival.

movies.title: The Matrix (1999) Dual Audio
movies.subtitle: [Hindi Dubbed & English]
movies.description: A computer hacker learns from mysterious rebels about the true nature of his reality and his role in the war against its controllers.

movies.title: Elemental (2023)
movies.subtitle: [Hindi Dubbed & English]
movies.description: Follows Ember and Wade, in a city where fire-, water-, land- and air-residents live together.

movies.title: Avatar (2009) Dual Audio
movies.subtitle: [Hindi Dubbed & English]
movies.description: A paraplegic Marine dispatched to the moon Pandora on a unique mission becomes torn between following his orders and protecting the world.

movies.title: Toy Story 4 (2019)
movies.subtitle: [Hindi Dubbed & English]
movies.description: When a new toy called Forky joins Woody and the gang, a road trip alongside old and new friends reveals how big the world can be for a toy.
